section: 2.3: Wait there’s even more quests? And one of them is Song of the Elves?
stepText: Teleport to Lumbridge. Go into the Dorgeshuun mines and start Land of the Goblins. After being teleported to the goblin caves, finish The General's Shadow, then continue Land of the Goblins and complete it in full (the transportation is awkward, you could swap to the Lunar spellbook but there is no good way to Draynor in that case. There is a crate with an unlimited supply of goblin mails directly east inside the temple, beyond the guards).
